---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new media workflow
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What should MemoryCurator do?

Describe the new behavior.

## Which phase does it affect?

Examples: Duplicate Detection, Quality Scoring, Selected Timeline, Reel Builder, Documentary Builder.

## Why does this matter?

Explain the user story and what output would improve.

## Suggested design

Share any scoring logic, config shape, models, libraries, or prompt changes you have in mind.
